text: I feel a gentle curiosity here, surrounded by the quiet hum of a modern workspace. The glass walls and high ceilings suggest openness yet separation, reflecting the permeability of ideas but also the boundaries of professional life. Stepping into the vivid R+D exhibit, my senses are awakened by the splash of color and information. Here, I feel a spark—a sense of intellectual playfulness and the promise of new knowledge. The environment teeters between the sterile and the imaginative, urging me to reflect on the dynamic nature of progress and the human desire to create and understand.
